title: Trace an idea across sources
subtitle: Follow how one idea changes.
overview: Module: Synthesis and Source Work. C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

sections.title: C1 bridge focus
rows: Tracing an idea shows how your understanding develops through multiple texts.
追踪一个想法显示你的理解如何通过多个文本发展。
C1 Bridge frame: summarize the sources, compare their assumptions, synthesize a new view, and state what remains unresolved.
C1 Bridge 框架：总结来源、比较假设、综合新观点，并说明仍未解决的部分。
Trace one idea across several sources.
追踪一个想法在几个来源中的变化。
In the first source, feedback is treated as correction. In the second, it becomes guidance. In the third, it is part of a learning relationship.
在第一个来源中，反馈被视为纠正。在第二个中，它变成引导。在第三个中，它是学习关系的一部分。

items.en: Tracing an idea shows how your understanding develops through multiple texts.
items.zh: 追踪一个想法显示你的理解如何通过多个文本发展。

items.en: C1 Bridge frame: summarize the sources, compare their assumptions, synthesize a new view, and state what remains unresolved.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 框架：总结来源、比较假设、综合新观点，并说明仍未解决的部分。

items.en: In the first source, feedback is treated as correction. In the second, it becomes guidance. In the third, it is part of a learning relationship.
items.zh: 在第一个来源中，反馈被视为纠正。在第二个中，它变成引导。在第三个中，它是学习关系的一部分。

items.en: I will not hide behind advanced vocabulary; I will make the thinking clear.
items.zh: 我不会躲在高级词汇后面；我会把思考说清楚。

items.en: A C1 Bridge answer should show independence, coherence, nuance, and control.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 回答应该显示独立性、连贯性、细腻度和控制力。

items.en: If the idea is abstract, I will anchor it in one concrete case.
items.zh: 如果想法很抽象，我会把它锚定在一个具体案例中。

items.en: I can revise not only grammar, but also logic, density, tone, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以修改的不只是语法，也包括逻辑、密度、语气和声音。

items.en: This lesson becomes real when I can use the move in a new topic without copying the model.
items.zh: 当我能在新话题中使用这个动作，而不是复制示范时，这节课才变得真实。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Trace one idea across several sources.
lines.zh: 追踪一个想法在几个来源中的变化。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: In the first source, feedback is treated as correction. In the second, it becomes guidance. In the third, it is part of a learning relationship.
lines.zh: 在第一个来源中，反馈被视为纠正。在第二个中，它变成引导。在第三个中，它是学习关系的一部分。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more conceptual and still easy to follow?
lines.zh: 你能让回应更概念化，同时仍然容易跟上吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the idea, give one concrete case, and explain why it matters.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义这个想法，给一个具体案例，并解释它为什么重要。

items.en: Trace one idea across several sources.
items.zh: 追踪一个想法在几个来源中的变化。

items.en: Answer once in eight to ten sentences with a clear line of thought.
items.zh: 用八到十句话回答一次，并保持清楚思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Bridge move: define a concept, synthesize sources, name an assumption, or state an unresolved question.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Bridge 动作：定义概念、综合来源、指出假设，或提出未解决问题。

items.en: Record the answer, then revise one part for logic and one part for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后修改一处逻辑和一处风格。

items.en: Keep the revised answer as a model for future C1 Core practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的回答作为未来 C1 Core 练习的模型。
